productDisplayName: Nike Men Grey & White Sports Shoes
description: Style NoteStep out and run in absolute style in nike Zoom Structure+ 15 running shoes. Replete with Nike Zoom units that offer ultimate cushioning, this shoe also offers superior Fit, traction and stability that allow you to run for miles in style. Featuring a Nike+ Ready option, this shoe can be teamed with Nike+ compatible iPods, stop watches and much more to clock your fitness regime.Product Details Breathable mesh upper with nearly seamless construction for ample ventilation and reduced irritationInner bootie that wraps around the foot offering exceptional comfortExtended Flywire panels for lightweight comfort, super strong support and more secure fit around the midfootSymmetrical lace-up system for a snug fitMeshed and padded tongue and sockliner for in-step comfortPhylon midsole with Nike Zoom unit in the heel for ultra-lightweight, springy cushioning, soft responsive shock absorption and superior fitPadded footbed for all-day comfortEnvironmentally preferred rubber outsole for enhanced durabilityBRS 1000 Carbon rubber under the heel for abrasion resistanceWaffle pattern for maximum traction, with a scooped heel for extra cushioningMaterial and CareSyntheticWipe surface with soft, clean, damp cloth to remove dirtDo not store under direct sunlight
